を出力してください。

```python
def extract_info(info):
    title = info.split("は")[1].strip()
    year = info.split("年")[1].strip()
    director = info.split("監督")[1].strip()
    cast = [cast.strip() for cast in info.split("の")[-2].split(", ")]
    return {"title": title, "year": year, "director": director, "cast": cast}
